memberdef.name: setArgChain1
setArgChain2
memberdef.initializer: KERNEL->setArg(0, _A); \ KERNEL->setArg(1, _B); \ CQ->enqueueNDRangeKernel( \ KERNEL.value(), NullRange, NDRange(_GSIZE), NDRange(_LSIZE));

memberdef.name: setArgChain3
memberdef.initializer: KERNEL->setArg(0, _A); \ KERNEL->setArg(1, _B); \ KERNEL->setArg(2, _C); \ CQ->enqueueNDRangeKernel( \ KERNEL.value(), NullRange, NDRange(_GSIZE), NDRange(_LSIZE));
